<!-- This checklist loads automatically for every new pull request. -->

## Who does what — read this first

- **Authors** create **one branch per publication** and add the cover page to it (two ways below). You do this once.
- **Reviewers** never create a branch and never commit anything. You review entirely in the browser: open the PR, read the cover page under **Files changed**, and leave comments.
- **Paper Handler** (PubCom) opens and closes the review and applies labels.

### Authors — add your cover page (pick one)

**✅ Recommended — in the browser, no command line:**
1. On the repo, click **Add file → Create new file**.
2. Name it `Publications/<your-title>.md` and paste your completed cover page (copy [`Publications/summary_doc_template.md`](../blob/main/Publications/summary_doc_template.md) and fill it in).
3. At the bottom, choose **Commit to a new branch**, then **Propose new file → Create pull request**. That makes the branch, the commit, and this PR in one step.

**Alternative — command line:** branch off `main`, add `Publications/<your-title>.md`, commit, push, open the PR.

Then paste the same cover-page text at the bottom of this description so reviewers see it without opening another tab.
_(Software or data deliverable? Same steps — just set the **Class** field to `e` on the cover page.)_

### Reviewers — how to comment (all in the browser)
- **On a specific line:** the **Files changed** tab → hover a line of the cover page → click the blue **+** → type your comment → **Start a review**. Prefix required feedback with **`Request:`**.
- **General note:** the **Conversation** tab. React with 👍 to **upvote** a comment — more upvotes = higher priority.

---

## Review lifecycle checklist

**Author — before review**
- [ ] Branch created + cover page committed (browser or CLI)
- [ ] Category / Class / Timeline filled in
- [ ] Author contact(s) listed (1–3, at least one ISSC member)
- [ ] Detailed-description section outline enumerated
- [ ] Link to the publication (PDF / Overleaf / Zenodo) included
- [ ] Opened as a **Draft**; assignees = all authors; no reviewers yet

**Paper Handler — open**
- [ ] Procedural compliance checked; category / class / timeline confirmed
- [ ] Labels applied; **Draft → Ready for review**
- [ ] Requested reviewers added; ISSC emailed (PR link + abstract + publication link)

**First Review**
- [ ] Reviewers comment (`Request:` = required; 👍 to upvote)
- [ ] Authors respond to every comment, offer co-authorship, upload a revision

**Paper Handler — close / follow-up**
- [ ] Original commenter resolves their own comment; Handler adjudicates the rest
- [ ] Follow-up round if `Request:` comments remain (once more at most)

**Conclusion**
- [ ] Handler releases + recommends to the Chair; Chair records the decision
- [ ] ISSC author line (Mandatory / Encouraged) or acknowledgement (Optional) added
- [ ] Label → `status: concluded`; merge
